goal: mask_seq_sum(a, image_of_range[Nat](p), k) = limit(partial[Real](mask(a, image_of_range(p, k))))
proof: function(x0: Nat -> Real, x1: Nat -> Set[Nat], x2: Nat) { limit(partial[Real](mask(x0, x1(x2)))) = mask_seq_sum(x0, x1, x2) }(a, image_of_range[Nat](p), k)

goal: partial[Real](compose[Nat, Nat, Real](a, p), k) = mask_seq_sum(a, image_of_range[Nat](p), k)
partial[Real](compose[Nat, Nat, Real](a, p)) = mask_seq_sum(a, image_of_range[Nat](p))

proof: function(x0: Nat -> Set[Nat], x1: Nat -> Real) { seq_union[Nat](x0) != Set.universal_set[Nat] or not is_increasing[Nat](x0) or not absolutely_converges(x1) or converges_to(mask_seq_sum(x1, x0), limit(partial[Real](x1))) }(image_of_range[Nat](p), a)
